title: viola yezoensis var. hebeiensis
intro: Viola yezoensis var. hebeiensis, also known as Hebei viola, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the viola genus. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Viola yezoensis var. hebeiensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its herbal preparations are also available in capsule or tablet form.
